subcodes.title: Words spoken in Sep. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: I know of your work. I think a great deal of it. I know your desire is to serve mankind, and to draw together Humanity
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @empty learning; false spirituality, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @humility; meekness; lowliness
